# GamingDiver

> Upload your World of Warships Legends data export and get rich visual insights. Privacy-first — your game data never leaves your browser.

GamingDiver is a free, client-side web app that analyzes WoWS Legends data exports. Players request their data from Wargaming, upload the ZIP file, and instantly see detailed stats, charts, and insights.

## Features

- **Career Overview**: Win rate, K/D ratio, average damage, survival rate, accuracy, play time, account resources (doubloons, silver, Global XP)
- **Ship Stats**: Sortable table of all ships with battles, win rate, damage, K/D, spotting damage, potential damage (tanking), accuracy, XP, and last played date
- **Top Ships**: Filterable leaderboard by nation, tier, and type — sort by most played, win rate, damage, K/D, spotting, tanking, caps, and more
- **Port (Collection)**: Complete ship collection tracker with owned/not-owned/sold status, completion percentages by nation, sort by name/tier/battles/XP
- **Trends**: Performance trends over time via snapshots, monthly activity chart, play time heatmap, session duration analysis
- **Sold Ship Recovery**: Identifies sold premium ships (with recovery ticket costs) and sold tech tree ships (with repurchase prices)
- **Clan Display**: Shows clan tag and membership date

## How It Works

1. Request your data export from Wargaming (wowslegends.com → Account Management → Data Export)
2. Upload the ZIP file to gamingdiver.com
3. All analysis happens in your browser — no data is sent to any server

## Technical Details

- 100% client-side (vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- No server, no database, no accounts required
- Uses IndexedDB for optional snapshot storage (trend tracking across uploads)
- Hosted on GitHub Pages with Cloudflare CDN
- Supports all WoWS Legends platforms (Xbox, PlayStation)

## Links

- Website: https://gamingdiver.com
- Export Guide: https://gamingdiver.com/export-guide.html
- Privacy Policy: https://gamingdiver.com/privacy.html
- Feedback: https://github.com/chappg/gamingdiver/issues
